title: Blossom Totem
description: Tired of a boring totem? Add some flowers and ✨Aesthetify it. Matches with the Particle Pack "Sakura Totem Particles" Found on my profile.
body: Tired of a **boring** totem?! Tired of your game **looking boring**?! How about add some _prettyness_ with a Flower Totem! Adds simple cherry blossoms spiraling around the totem.
